alerts.title: Leaks: Opus 4.8 release context
alerts.detail: Reddit community noting that Anthropic just released Opus 4.8. Releasing Fable 5 so soon after Opus 4.8 seems unlikely to some traders, adding weight to a delayed launch hypothesis.

alerts.title: Leaks: Confirmed safety focus
alerts.detail: Reddit users confirm that Fable 5, unlike Mythos (which could chain zero-day exploits), has been heavily realigned for consumer safety, likely explaining the delayed rollout while they test it on Azure.

alerts.title: Leaks: 'Claude Fruitcake EAP' checkpoint?
alerts.detail: Reddit users digging through Azure endpoints spotted another internal checkpoint name alongside Fable 5, designated 'Fruitcake EAP'. Suggests intense backend testing is underway.

alerts.title: Pricing Leaks: 2x Opus?
alerts.detail: Reddit community discussing leaked pricing tiers for Fable 5, suggesting it will be roughly double the cost of Claude Opus, cementing it as an ultra-premium tier.

verdict.reasoning: Despite heavy leaks on X and Reddit confirming the existence of 'Claude Fable 5' and spotted API endpoints on cloud providers, the massive $35B Apollo infrastructure deal and S-1 IPO filing mean Anthropic's PR is locked today. A release later this week (missing the June 9 Polymarket deadline) aligns better with corporate timelines.
